chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 991 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 30-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Shar, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with Burhan Hyder Lodhi, District Accounts Officer, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondent-bank, and seeks an adjournment on the ground that the latter is busy before another Bench of this Court. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, learned Deputy Attorney General-I Sukkur files statement along with concise statement on behalf of Respondents No.3 and 4, which is taken on record. It reflects from such statements that Pakistan Rangers Sindh Karachi forwarded his documents for conversion of his monthly pension into DCS (District Credit System). It is observed that the pension of petitioner was stopped in view of CSR 351(i); however, it is surfaced from the concise statement filed today that letter for reasonable assurance regarding conduct of petitioner was sent to the Pakistan Rangers Sindh Karachi and the requisite documents are still awaited from quarters concerned. It is further stated in statement that keeping in view the financial hardships of the petitioner the office is releasing his monthly pension with effect from November, 2025 and the arrears of the petitioner will be paid after receiving certain documents. Under the circumstances, we direct the respondents to start monthly pension of petitioner from November, 2025 regularly and expedite the case of petitioner in respect of arrears and finalize the same within three months.

It is further stated in statement that keeping in view the financial hardships of the petitioner the office is releasing his monthly pension with effect from November, 2025 and the arrears of the petitioner will be paid after receiving certain documents. Under the circumstances, we direct the respondents to start monthly pension of petitioner from November, 2025 regularly and expedite the case of petitioner in respect of arrears and finalize the same within three months. In view of above, this Petition is disposed of. The compliance report shall be furnished after expiry of above period through Additional Registrar of this Court. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
